'''Nightsinger's Orb''' was the moon of [[Pella]] in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The moon was owned by the [[Hejaran family]] of [[House Mecetti]]. [[Hejaran Castle]] was located on the moon. The moon was named for the native [[nightsinger]], a large bat-winged predator.

{{Moon-stub}}
